channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19777] rolling-downgrade-client2 sanity test_413A: lmv.*.qos_rr_index was != 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sbansal <sbansal@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1bc63147-38dd-442a-b9b3-d38c637cc6e5

test_413A failed with the following error:

lmv.*.qos_rr_index was  != 1

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es6_0/875 - 4.18.0-553.76.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es6_0/875 - 4.18.0-553.76.1.el8_lustre.ddn17.x86_64

== sanity test 413A: get and set qos_rr_index on all clients ========================================= 09:01:55 (1763110915)
before
CMD: onyx-157vm49.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-157vm50 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param lmv.*.qos_rr_index
onyx-157vm50: error: get_param: param_path 'lmv/*/qos_rr_index': No such file or directory
lmv.lustre-clilmv-ff4a9514047c3800.qos_rr_index=52
CMD: onyx-157vm49.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n lmv.*.qos_rr_index=0
CMD: onyx-157vm50 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n lmv.*.qos_rr_index=1
onyx-157vm50: error: set_param: param_path 'lmv/*/qos_rr_index': No such file or directory
after
CMD: onyx-157vm49.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-157vm50 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param lmv.*.qos_rr_index
onyx-157vm50: error: get_param: param_path 'lmv/*/qos_rr_index': No such file or directory
lmv.lustre-clilmv-ff4a9514047c3800.qos_rr_index=0
CMD: onyx-157vm49.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n lmv.*.qos_rr_index
CMD: onyx-157vm50 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n lmv.*.qos_rr_index
onyx-157vm50: error: get_param: param_path 'lmv/*/qos_rr_index': No such file or directory
sanity test_413A: @@@@@@ FAIL: lmv.*.qos_rr_index was != 1
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6884:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:28535:test_413A()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7241:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7302:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7125:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:28540:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2025-11-13/lustre-b_es6_0_rolling-upgrade-downgrade_875_231_c3442da0-4382-4ff0-a2fb-3a37dafc1cb1/lustre-b_es6_0_rolling-downgrade-client2_875_231_6//sanity.test_413A.*.1763110917.log
CMD: onyx-157vm49.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-157vm50,onyx-157vm51,onyx-157vm52 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2025-11-13/lustre-b_es6_0_rolling-upgrade-downgrade_875_231_c3442da0-4382-4ff0-a2fb-3a37dafc1cb1/lustre-b_es6_0_rolling-downgrade-client2_875_231_6//sanity.test_413A.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1763110917.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2025-11-13/lustre-b_es6_0_rolling-upgrade-downgrade_875_231_c3442da0-4382-4ff0-a2fb-3a37dafc1cb1/lustre-b_es6_0_rolling-downgrade-client2_875_231_6//sanity.test_413A.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1763110917.log

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_413A - lmv.*.qos_rr_index was != 1

status.description: This issue is being actively worked on at the moment by the assignee.

comments.comment:
This is only being hit during rolling-downgrade-client2 testing, with client1 running master (where the test case is running), and client2 running 2.15.8 or 2.16.0 (which is missing the LU-19424 patch), so checking $CLIENT_VERSION in the test is insufficient for the subtest accessing new functionality on client2.

Fortunately, client2 is not directly used very often in sanity, and in the few cases that it is, it appears to mostly be using longstanding functionality - ...lru_size=clear in test_418() and multiop (has existed forever) and LSOM in test_806() (since v2_11_53_0-27-gf1ebf88aef).
